Home Request a Quote

Request a Quote

quote

Request a Quote

Have questions? Need a quote? We're here to help. Tell us about your locker room project—we'll respond within 2–3 business days.

How our quote process works

Share your project details in the form below. We'll prepare an accurate quote and walk you through options. 50% deposit to begin production. Quick ship in one month or custom-built in three months.

1. You tell us your sport, quantities, and requirements.
2. We send a detailed quote within 2–3 business days.
3. We review with you and refine until it's right.
Need help now? Call 1 888 584 1444 or email sales@playerstall.com.

Tell us about your project

Fields marked with * are required.

Project & Locker Details

1000 characters left

Contact & Organization Details

Drawings & Attachments (optional)

Attach floor plans, locker room layouts, or inspiration photos to help our team prepare the most accurate quote. For files larger than 10 MB, please email sales@playerstall.com.

By submitting this form, you agree that a PlayerStall representative may contact you about your project. We will never share your information with third parties.

PlayerStall

Luxury custom-built wood lockers with full color options. Quick ship in one month (24" width) or custom-built in three months. 30+ years of craftsmanship.

2934 200 Street, Langley, BC V2Z 2C1 Canada

sales@playerstall.com

1 888 584 1444

our services

  • Full locker room solutions
  • Quick ship lockers

QUICK CONTACT INFO

Premium wood lockers at unbeatable prices. Quick ship in 2–4 weeks or custom in 8–12 weeks. We'll match any USA competitor's price. Call for a free quote.

b Monday-Friday: 9am to 5pm;
Saturday: 10am to 2pm
